OXCCUâ€™s OX1 plant, commissioned in 2024 at London Oxford Airport, is the worldâ€™s first demonstration facility to convert COâ‚‚ and hydrogen directly into jetâ€‘fuelâ€‘range hydrocarbons in a single catalytic step.
